interpretation: Au 2026-07-01 : SHORT_PREMIUM_STRONG (z 1.873). Nature **PRIME_EXCESSIVE** (tension MEDIUM), cycle de vie **COMPRESSION_HEALTHY** (santé HEALTHY, compression 2.34).
